section_1_data_health.narrative: Data systems are healthy. No critical violations detected.

top_3_violations.plain_language: [INJECTED TEST] The Week 3 Document Refinery produced data where the field 'extracted_facts.confidence' failed a range check. confidence is in 0-100 range, not 0.0-1.0. Breaking change detected. Downstream systems affected: week4-cartographer, week7-ai-contract-extensions.

The Week 5 Event Sourcing Platform produced data where the field 'aggregate_id' failed a pattern check. 50 values do not match pattern '^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$'. Downstream systems affected: week7-contract-enforcer.

The Week 5 Event Sourcing Platform produced data where the field 'payload.application_id' failed a pattern check. 50 values do not match pattern '^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$'. Downstream systems affected: week7-contract-enforcer.

Immediate action required — breaking changes detected.

section_5_recommendations.action: Update src/event_store.py to fix contract clause week5-event-records.aggregate_id.pattern: field 'aggregate_id' outputs 50 non-matching values but contract week5-event-records requires matches pattern: ^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$. This is a HIGH severity violation — pipeline blocked in ENFORCE mode.
section_5_recommendations.estimated_impact: Resolves HIGH violation in Week 5 Event Sourcing Platform and restores ENFORCE mode compatibility.

section_5_recommendations.action: Coordinate schema migration for Week 3 Document Refinery before next deployment: 1 breaking change(s) detected in contract week3-document-refinery-extractions. First breaking change: NARROW_TYPE: extraction_model (string → integer). Run: python contracts/schema_analyzer.py --contract-id week3-document-refinery-extractions to generate full migration checklist and rollback plan.
section_5_recommendations.estimated_impact: Prevents silent data corruption in downstream consumers caused by unannounced breaking schema change.

section_5_recommendations.action: Run python contracts/generator.py --all --annotate weekly to refresh contract clauses and update baselines in schema_snapshots/baselines.json. Stale contracts produce false positives that erode team trust in enforcement.
section_5_recommendations.estimated_impact: Prevents contract staleness — the most common production enforcement failure mode per DOMAIN_NOTES.md.
